title: Who's Most Likely To?

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
each players name e.g. "Mum" on one switch 
"Dad" on the other
sections.middleText2: two people the switch user is going to answer questions about

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Ask the switch user a silly question, e.g. "Who's most likely to fall asleep on the sofa?"
2. The switch user answers by pressing the switch that matches their choice.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to answer silly questions about people

extraPages.title: WHO'S MOST LIKELY TO: QUESTION IDEAS
extraPages.subtitle: WHO'S MOST LIKELY TO...
items: Spend all their money on something silly?
Have a lion as a pet?
